entries.text: Installed Xcode Metal toolchain — Unreal shaders compile
Unreal MCP server started on port 8000
Grok handshake OK — 3 MCP tools discovered
Game Lab living document created — collaborative learning hub is live
Game script workspace opened — ready for premise brainstorm
Premise direction: Quivly.ai marketing micro-game for team + customers — short, fun, enterprise-style
Draft script written: Quivly Renewal Rush — 90s post-sales arcade loop
Fetched quivly.ai landing page — synced copy, Connect→See→Score→Act flow, brand colors, forest logo into game script
Lesson 2 via Unreal MCP: enabled EditorToolset, reskinned Lvl_ArenaShooter (sky hidden, PPV_QuivlyCommand added)
MCP polish pass 2: Quivly sun/skylight/fog tuned, SM_SkySphere hidden, weapon meshes hidden, PPV bloom applied
Pushed to GitHub: github.com/mukulchugh/renewal-rush (private, Git LFS for Content assets)
Premise locked: Signal Triage (Whack-a-Risk) — browser-first, Unreal demoted to sandbox. Validation test PASS.
Stack narrative added: Connect phase (6 integrations) → multi-source signal chips → Full Stack / Market boost multipliers — gamifies Quivly end-to-end.
Renewal Rush playable prototype shipped: game-lab/renewal-rush.html — stack rail, signal chips, 90s loop, end screen.

Renewal Rush 3D shipped: renewal-rush-3d.html (Three.js FPS) — WASD, pointer-lock aim, floating orbs, stack pillars. Unreal MCP pass: 5 AccountOrbs labeled, gun hidden, Lvl_ArenaShooter set as default map.
